lines: Dor' umuns' urakuze :Reb' aho rirengeye !Reb' ukwezi n'inyenyeri : Dore, biragaragaye, Bitwakira.
Data wera, wera, Mwani Imana, Wuzuy' isi n'ijuru; Twese tugusingize,
Rurema, Nyirigira, Ngwino, turakwifuza.Twes' utwuzuz' urukundo, Utugir'
Ni hacur' umwijirna. Utugotesh' umucyo !Weyur' ibikingiriza Imitima yacu
Duhe kukwiringira : Ni dupfa, Mucunguzi,Tuzabon' umucyo mwinshi, Nukw’ ijoro
